allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/ai/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-asai-demo-user-email: demo.manager@asai.local" -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"用 get_team_overview 查一下團隊目前的客戶數、報告完成率與本月 AI 使用量"}],"context":{"route":"/team"}}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count=',len\(d['reports']\)\); [print\(' -',r['id'][:24],'|',r['clientName'],'|',r['sections'][0]['title'] if r['sections'] else 'no-sections','| interview=',r.get\('interviewSessionId'\)\) for r in d['reports']]")

Bash(curl -s -w '\\nHTTP=%{http_code}\\n' -X POST -H 'x-asai-demo-user-email: demo.member@asai.local' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"output":{"clientProfile":{"relationship":"科技業中階主管，雙薪家庭","family":"配偶林小美、子王小明8歲","workIncome":"年收入約180萬","existingCoverage":"定期壽險500萬、住院醫療日額2000","knownFacts":["有房貸","子女教育金尚未規劃"],"unknownsToConfirm":["失能收入保障額度"],"likelyIssues":["醫療險不足","子女教育金缺口"],"decisionContext":"與配偶共同決策","communicationNotes":"重視數字與CP值"},"conversationPrepCard":{"opening":"先回顧家庭責任","talkTracks":["量化教育金缺口"],"firstQuestions":["若收入中斷家庭可撐多久？"],"landmines":["避免一開始談保費"],"desiredNextStep":"安排30分鐘保障檢視"},"spinQuestionCandidates":[{"phase":"PROBLEM","question":"現有醫療額度夠嗎？"}],"pqQuestions":["最擔心的財務風險是什麼？"],"issueReadiness":[{"issueKey":"medical","label":"醫療缺口","level":3,"reason":"已意識到日額偏低","nextStep":"試算實支實付"}],"personalityInference":"偏分析型，需要證據","complianceNotes":["不得保證報酬"]}}' http://localhost:3000/api/clients/c_wang/reports)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count=',len\(d['reports']\)\); [print\(' -',r['id'][:26],'|',r['sections'][0]['title'] if r['sections'] else 'none','| sections=',len\(r['sections']\)\) for r in d['reports']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count=',len\(d['reports']\),'->', [r['id'] for r in d['reports']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', len\(d['clients']\)\); [print\(c['id'], c['name']\) for c in d['clients']]")
